name: Emergency Ambulance - 108
description: Free 24/7 emergency ambulance for medical emergencies, accidents, pregnancy complications, fire. Available across all states in India. Fleet includes basic and advanced life support ambulances. Police, fire, and medical combined emergency response.

name: National Emergency Number - 112
description: Single emergency number for police, fire, and ambulance. Dial 112 from any phone. Women can specifically press 1 after call connects for police response. Available in all states.接通后按1转警局。
feature: Women safety: press 1 after connecting for police

name: Women Helpline - 181
description: 24/7 national women helpline for domestic violence, harassment, abuse, dowry issues, cyber crime against women. Links callers to police, shelter homes, legal aid. Free, confidential, in Hindi and other regional languages. महिलाओं के लिए 24/7 मुफ्त हेल्पलाइन।

name: Women Helpline - 1091 (Delhi/State-specific)
description: Old women emergency helpline number in some states. In Delhi and some states, 1091 connects to dedicated women police helpline for immediate police assistance and counseling.

name: Child Helpline - 1098
description: 24-hour helpline for children in need of care, protection, and rescue. Handles child labor, trafficking, missing children, abuse, child marriage. ASHA workers and police respond. Free, confidential, in multiple languages. बच्चों के लिए 24/7 हेल्पलाइन।

name: Police Emergency - 100
description: Police emergency helpline for crime reporting, law and order issues, accident reporting. For non-life-threatening emergencies. For life-threatening situations, dial 112 which has faster response.

name: Fire Brigade - 101
description: Fire emergency helpline. For building fires, vehicle fires, electrical fires, gas leaks. Available in all cities and most towns. Call 101 for fire brigade response.

name: Kisan Call Center - 1800-180-1551
description: Free helpline for farmers. Get advice on farming techniques, crop diseases, weather updates, market prices, government scheme information. Available in Hindi and regional languages. Expert agricultural officers answer queries. किसानों के लिए मुफ्त हेल्पलाइन।

name: Ayushman Bharat Helpline - 14555
description: Check eligibility for Ayushman Bharat PMJAY health insurance (Rs 5 lakh/year coverage). Find empanelled hospitals near you. Get help with Ayushman Card enrollment. Available in Hindi and English. आयुष्मान पात्रता जांचें।

name: Elder Helpline - 14567
description: National helpline for senior citizens facing abuse, neglect, or needing assistance with pensions, healthcare, legal matters, and government schemes. Available in multiple languages. बु пожилые граждане могут позвонить для помощи.

name: Vandrevala Foundation - Mental Health Helpline
description: Free 24/7 mental health support. Counseling for depression, anxiety, stress, suicidal thoughts. Available in Hindi and English. Referrals to mental health professionals. If in crisis, call 112 or visit nearest hospital.

name: National Poison Information Centre - AIIMS Delhi
name_hi: राष्ट्रीय विषबाल सूचना केंद्र - एम्स दिल्ली
description: Expert advice for poisoning emergencies - pesticides, medicines, chemicals, snake bites, food poisoning. Doctors available for immediate guidance. For pesticide poisoning in rural areas, this is critical. विषबाल आपातकालीन सलाह।

name: National Disaster Management Helpline - 1078
description: Helpline for natural disasters - floods, earthquakes, cyclones, landslides. Information on relief camps, evacuation, shelter, rescue operations. State disaster control rooms also available.

name: Cyber Crime Helpline - 1930
description: Report online fraud, UPI scams, social media harassment, identity theft, online banking fraud, OTP fraud. Police will call back within 30 minutes in metros. For non-emergency, file at cybercrime.gov.in.
note: Report at cybercrime.gov.in for non-urgent matters

name: Blood Bank Helpline - 1910
description: Find nearest blood bank, request blood units, information on blood donation camps. Indian Red Cross Society operates nationwide blood bank network. Blood is free for poor patients, nominal charge for others.

name: National Consumer Helpline - 1800-11-4000
description: File complaints about defective products, poor services, unfair trade practices. Free legal advice on consumer rights. Can file complaint online at consumeraffairs.nic.in.

name: LPG Gas Emergency - 1906
description: Report LPG gas leaks, cylinder delivery issues, connection problems. Also for PM Ujjwala Yojana queries, new connection status. Available 24/7 for gas leak emergencies.

name: Electricity Complaint - 1912
description: Report power outages, billing issues, electrical hazards, theft, and meter problems. Connect to your state electricity board. For life-threatening electrical situations, call 112.

name: Railway Enquiry - 139
description: Indian Railways enquiry for train status, PNR check, seat availability, general railway information. Also available via 132 (for SMS-based updates).
note: Also check trainman.com, confirmtkt.com for PNR status

name: RTI (Right to Information) Helpline
description: Help with filing RTI applications to get information from government departments. Available in Hindi and English. File RTI online at rtionline.gov.in.

name: Common Service Center (CSC) - 1800-121-3468
description: CSC provides government services: Aadhaar enrollment, PAN card, passport, scheme applications, banking, insurance. 4.5 lakh+ CSCs across rural India. Find nearest at locator.csccloud.in.

name: Jan Aushadhi Kendra Locator - 1800-180-1111
description: Find nearest Jan Aushadhi Kendra for affordable generic medicines (50-80% cheaper than branded). 18,646 Kendras across India. 2,110 medicines and 315 surgical items available. No prescription needed.

name: Free Legal Aid - 15100
description: Free legal aid for poor and marginalized. Help with filing cases, legal advice, court representation. Available through National Legal Services Authority (NALSA). Women and SC/ST get priority.

name: Health Helpline - 104
description: State health helpline in many states for medical advice, hospital information, ambulance coordination, and health scheme information. Available in various states.

name: iCall - Suicide Prevention Helpline
description: Free, confidential mental health support for those in distress. Available 8am-10pm in multiple languages including Hindi. Referrals to psychiatrists and hospitals if needed. Not just suicide — any emotional crisis.

name: Dairy Farmer Helpline - 011-23010488
description: Help for dairy farmers regarding cattle care, milk prices, dairy schemes, fodder, and animal health. Information on government schemes for dairy development.
note: Also contact state animal husbandry department
